content: Define the TopModule with its interface including clk, load, ena, data inputs, and q output.
source:
input  clk
input  load
input  ena  (2 bits)
input  data (100 bits)
output q    (100 bits)

content: Implement a 100-bit register to store the data input when the load signal is active. This register should be updated on the positive edge of the clock.
source:
input  clk
input  load
input  data (100 bits)

content: Design and implement the logic to determine the direction of rotation based on the 2-bit ena input. This logic will control whether the data in the register is shifted left or right.
Implement the rotation logic that modifies the data in the register based on the direction specified by the ena input. Ensure that the rotation is cyclic and the combinational depth is minimized.
source:
input  ena  (2 bits)
input  data (100 bits)

content: Connect the output of the rotation logic to the q output port, ensuring that the data is correctly outputted from the module.
